empty.noGlossariesHint: Create separate glossaries for a show or domain, then enable the ones you need.
empty.selectGlossaryHint: Glossaries are global resources, so tasks never need a separate glossary selection.
empty.noEntriesHint: Add an entry or import a CSV / TXT file.
empty.noSearchResultsHint: Search the source, expected translation, or note.

format.templateHint: The template columns are source, target, and note; note is optional. CSV is recommended for full fidelity.
format.txtExportHint: TXT replaces line breaks and tabs in source, target, and note with spaces. Use CSV to preserve them.

aiGuide.title: Enabled glossaries apply automatically to AI translation
aiGuide.description: Each AI/LLM batch receives only terms matched in its source subtitles. Translation tasks, proofread retranslations, and translation AI optimization share the same rule. If enabled glossaries contain the same source, the top glossary wins and the conflict is logged.

traditionalGuide.title: Configure terminology for machine translation at the provider
traditionalGuide.description: Local glossaries do not modify results from traditional providers such as Baidu, Aliyun, Volcano, or Tencent. Configure a provider glossary in its console when supported.

glossaryDialog.description: Glossary order determines which entry wins when sources conflict.
glossaryDialog.name: Glossary name
glossaryDialog.descriptionPlaceholder: Record the show, domain, or usage notes

entryDialog.description: Enter plain text—no regular expressions. Latin terms use word boundaries to avoid matching inside longer words.
entryDialog.sourcePlaceholder: For example: Alice, C++, Dr. Smith

deleteGlossary.title: Delete this glossary?
deleteGlossary.description: Glossary {{name}} and its {{count}} entries will be permanently deleted.

deleteEntry.title: Delete this entry?
deleteEntry.description: Source term {{source}} will be removed from this glossary.

errors.DUPLICATE_GLOSSARY_NAME: A glossary with this name already exists
errors.DUPLICATE_ENTRY_SOURCE: This source already exists in the glossary
errors.UNSUPPORTED_FILE_TYPE: Only CSV and TXT files are supported
errors.NO_VALID_ENTRIES: The file contains no valid glossary entries
errors.generic: The operation failed. Check the logs and try again.
